Name: Shower Sing-Alongs
Description: You know the ones—those guilty pleasures or anthemic choruses you belt out when no one’s listening (or maybe they are). Submit a song that transforms your shower into a private concert.

Name: Cinematic Soundscapes
Description: Bring out the big screen vibes with a song from a movie soundtrack. Whether it’s an epic orchestral score or the unforgettable tune that made a scene iconic, share the track that sticks with you long after the credits roll.

Name: Underrated Gems
Description: Some songs deserved more love—more radio play, more streams, more respect. Share a track you think was overlooked or underappreciated, and give it the spotlight it always earned.

Name: Remix Royalty
Description: Sometimes, the remix really is better. Submit a remixed version of a song that takes the original to new heights—whether it’s more danceable, more emotional, or just flat-out cooler.

Name: Bollywood Beats
Description: A celebration of the vibrant, emotional, and unforgettable world of Bollywood music. Submit a track that captures the magic of Indian cinema—whether it’s a dance-floor banger, a heart-wrenching ballad, or a timeless classic that has defined a generation.

Name: Heroic Anthems
Description: What’s your personal superhero theme song? Pick a track that makes you feel powerful, unstoppable, or ready to save the world—even if it’s just your morning commute.

Name: Rewriting the UK Anthem
Description: Rule Britannia, but with better vibes. If you had to pick a song to replace God Save the King as the UK’s national anthem, what would it be? Go bold, go cheeky, go iconic.

Name: Global Grooves (Non-English Only)
Description: Step outside the Anglosphere and bring the world to our ears. Share a song that’s entirely in a language other than English. From French rap to Japanese city pop to Brazilian bossa nova, let’s hear the rhythm and soul of another culture.

Name: Live and Loud
Description: Some songs don’t fully click until you hear them live. Share a track that transforms in front of an audience—whether it's the energy, improvisation, or raw emotion that only a live setting delivers.

Name: Slow Burners
Description: Not love at first listen? No problem. Share a song that took time to grow on you, but now you can’t imagine your playlist without it.

Name: Focus Mode: Activated
Description: Submit a track that helps you lock in and get stuff done. Whether it’s lo-fi, ambient, instrumental jazz, or hypnotic techno, these are the songs that power your deep work sessions.

Name: Love in Lyrics
Description: What is the ultimate love song? Whether it’s sweet, tragic, passionate, or poetic, nominate the track that best captures the many shades of love.

Name: Final Notes: Songs About Endings
Description: Goodbyes, finales, and the closing of chapters—submit a song that captures the feeling of something coming to an end. Whether it’s the end of a relationship, a season of life, or simply the last track on an album, these songs carry the weight of closure.
